description_long: This object is a robust axe featuring a solid, dark metallic head and a smoothly contoured wooden handle. The head has a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a rounded hammer poll on the opposite, making it suitable for both chopping and striking tasks. The wooden handle is slightly curved, ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip, and displays a natural wood grain pattern. The blade edge is straight and sharp, while the poll is cylindrical and blunt. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, with no visible fasteners or modern composite elements. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the head.
description: A sturdy axe with a dark metal head and a curved wooden handle, featuring a broad blade and a rounded hammer poll. The handle shows natural wood grain and the head is securely mounted.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the broad blade, rounded poll, and the curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the handle's oval cross-section and the compact width of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and poll profile, with the handle's curvature and wood grain visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, oval cross-section, and visible wood grain; ergonomically shaped for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a straight edge and a rounded hammer poll on the opposite side; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle, no visible fasteners.
